message:
fix: update dependencies to resolve security advisories

Resolves RUSTSEC-2026-0042 (aws-lc-fips-sys CRL Distribution Point Scope Check).
Note: RUSTSEC-2023-0071 (rsa Marvin Attack) remains — no fixed version available.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
